recent_bad_license_projects.name: MoleditPy-linux
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: A cross-platform, simple, and intuitive molecular structure editor built in Python. It allows 2D molecular drawing and 3D structure visualization. It supports exporting structure files for input to DFT calculation software.
